title: Meetings
doc_html:
§65.  Meetings

The board shall meet at least twice a year and may meet at such other times as it may designate.  Meetings may be held at any place within this state.

Acts 1974, No. 417, §1.
doc_text:
§65.  Meetings
The board shall meet at least twice a year and may meet at such other times as it may designate.  Meetings may be held at any place within this state.
Acts 1974, No. 417, §1.
